name: obsidian-mindmap
description: Brainstorming-focused mind map plugin for Obsidian

scripts.test: tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --moduleResolution node --outDir /private/tmp/obsidian-mindmap-tests --skipLibCheck src/mindmap/tree.ts src/mindmap/tree.test.ts src/mindmap/models.ts src/mindmap/layout.ts && node --test /private/tmp/obsidian-mindmap-tests/tree.test.js
